name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: “At least a dozen” military officers were missing from China’s legislative meetings, suspected to have been purged by Xi.

name: Injective 中文 🧬 🥷
fullText:
🚨 Injective 累计销毁超过 700 万枚 $INJ 代币，创历史新高🚨

社区回购机制是唯一一种能够随着生态系统增长而横向扩展的通缩机制，它利用 dApp 产生的收入销毁 INJ 代币，同时奖励忠实用户。

未来开始于此。 https://t.co/RYl8m60jfa
